summary: Ralph Iteration 8: Code quality and UX improvements. Extracted CollapsibleSection component for better code organization. Added ErrorBoundary for global error resilience. Enhanced ReviewForm and LocationForm with error messages, success confirmations, and accessibility attributes. Added 11 new test cases bringing client test count from 37 to 48. Fixed TypeScript errors and removed disabled code. All 106 tests passing (48 client + 58 server_node).
improvements: Extracted CollapsibleSection component to separate file for reusability
Added ErrorBoundary component for improved error resilience
Added form error messages and success confirmations
Added ARIA labels and semantic HTML attributes for accessibility
Added form field IDs for better label-input association
Added 11 new test cases for form validation (client: 37 → 48 tests)
Fixed TypeScript errors in test setup
Removed disabled childAge filter UI and code cleanup
Improved form validation with whitespace trimming
git_commits: 5e9a42f: feat: improve code quality with component extraction and error handling
fef713b: feat: improve form error handling and accessibility
e527909: test: add comprehensive test coverage for form validation
next_action: Project complete. Continue monitoring for further enhancement opportunities.
